A

ABOUT - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
"about": The name for the "The article is about" text.

Return true if dependencies betwen two packages are accepted.

Return true if the image accept an extension (whichc an be an ImageMap, a reference, or an external link).

Alignment - Interface in org.docgene.model
Represent the alignment.
ALIGNMENT_CENTER - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.JustifiedElement
The value for elements which are aligned on the center.
ALIGNMENT_INHERIT - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.JustifiedElement
The value for elements where the alignment inherits from the parent
ALIGNMENT_JUSTIFIED - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.JustifiedElement
The value for elements which are justified.
ALIGNMENT_LEFT - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.JustifiedElement
The value for elements which are aligned on the left.
ALIGNMENT_NONE - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.JustifiedElement
The value for elements which have no alignment.
ALIGNMENT_RIGHT - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.JustifiedElement
The value for elements which are aligned on the right.
allImageFilter - Variable in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
 
allowAutoDisambiguation(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesDictionary
Set if the automatic creation of disambiguation articles is allowed.
allowIdenticalTitleIDs(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel
Set if if the parser accept identical title IDs(default is true).
allowInvisibleChars() - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLPre
Return true if the invisible char character is supported.
allowMarkdown(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set if the Markdown format is accepted for articles.
allowMediawiki(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set if the Wikipedia Mediawiki format is accepted for articles.
